name: Senshu Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Senshu Electric Co., Ltd. operates as an electric trading company in Japan and internationally. It develops, sells, and consults information processing systems and communication systems. The company also manufactures and sells electronic control equipment and devices; and installs and sells air conditioning equipment, household electrical appliances, and office equipment. In addition, it is involved in the operation and management of power generation business; and sale and purchase of electricity. Further, the company engages in the real estate leasing business. Additionally, it offers equipment, communication, firefighting, heat resistant, network, thermocouple/compensated lead, instrumentation, and magnet wires. The company also provides power, control, signal, and various eco cables, as well as lightning rod, bare copper, and insulated wires; overseas standard cable, electric wire for robot, and electric wire for movement; and peripheral equipment, LAN, optical communications, and wire processing and network construction, as well as system solutions. The company was founded in 1922 and is headquartered in Suita, Japan.
